G 18 — OIML Term-Usage Registry

Dashboard for TC 1 / Vocabularies validating OIML G 18:202X.

How to use this registry

  1. Review priority actions below — terms needing immediate attention (outdated VIM refs, divergent definitions).
  2. Open the harmonisation worklist — every term cited by multiple OIML publications, sorted by divergence.
  3. For each term, review the grouped definitions (identical wording is collapsed) and decide: merge into one definition, or document why divergence is intentional.
  4. Check the latest edition — the registry automatically verifies whether each term still exists in VIM 2012 / VIML 2022.
  5. Filter by your TC/SC on the terms page to review only the publications your committee is responsible for.
  6. Submit changes to oimlsmart/vocab datasets/g18-202X/.

unique terms

consistent
